limitations: ai_investment_intensity scored 3 rather than 4/5: the 1,900 MW figure relates to renewable generation capacity for a customer data center, not direct AI capex by Xcel Energy itself; no dollar amounts for AI-specific infrastructure investment are disclosed in the excerpts

ai_narrative_concreteness: Xcel Energy's AI story is primarily as a utility serving AI/data center customers, not as an AI deployer internally; the Google data center agreement provides concrete deployment detail but reflects customer demand, not internal AI use cases

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: risk-section material is present and includes named AI-specific risk mechanisms (LLM-enhanced attacks, supply chain exposure, revenue/cost impacts), supporting score of 4; no quantified risk figures or named governance bodies appear in the excerpts
